/usr/bin/c++   -std=c++11 -Wall -O3 -g  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/uav_utils-test.dir/src/uav_utils_test.cpp.o  -o /home/wen/QAV_WS/devel/lib/uav_utils/uav_utils-test   -L/home/wen/QAV_WS/src/cmake_utils/lib/mosek8  -L/home/wen/QAV_WS/build/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wen/QAV_WS/src/cmake_utils/lib/mosek8:/home/wen/QAV_WS/build/gtest:/home/wen/QAV_WS/build/gtest/lib ../gtest/lib/libgtest.so -luav_utils -lpthread
